Why Do You Need
a Cookie Consent Management System?

Cookie consent management is critical for any organization that processes user data online. Data privacy laws such as GDPR, PDPA, and the ePrivacy Directive require websites to inform users and obtain consent before placing cookies.

  • Comply with GDPR, PDPA, CCPA and international privacy regulations
  • Automatically scan, detect and classify all cookies on your website
  • Protect your business from fines, legal risk and loss of customer trust
  • Maintain complete, auditable consent records for regulatory bodies
  • Build trust through transparent data collection practices
News

Supports Google
Consent Mode v2

A smart solution that helps websites align with privacy regulations by managing user data based on individual consent preferences. It works seamlessly with Google's ecosystem, including Google Analytics 4, Google Ads, SA360, and DV360.

With advanced conversion modeling, it enables businesses to recover valuable insights and optimize performance—even when users choose to limit cookie usage. This approach can improve conversion visibility and performance by up to 70%.

netkasystem.com
Since March 2024, Google has announced that those who wish to use data for marketing purposes must use Consent Mode v2.
✦ Key Features

Professional Cookie Made Simple

Automatic Cookie Scanning
and Classification

Our system automatically scans your entire website to detect, identify and classify all cookies into standard categories — Necessary, Functional, Analytics, and Marketing — with zero manual effort. The scanner re-runs continuously to catch new cookies as your site evolves.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) about Usage

Is there a free trial available?−
Yes, we offer a 30-day free trial with no credit card required. Simply fill in your information when signing up, and you'll be able to explore the core features of our system at no cost. You won’t be charged anything
Do I need to install anything after purchasing?+
No, installation is required. Netka’s solution is cloud-based (SaaS). After payment, you will receive login details via your order confirmation and welcome email, including your username and password. You can start using the system right away through your browser
What payment methods are available?+
We accept credit/debit card payments through Stripe — a secure, internationally recognized payment system
Is Netka’s solution secure?+
Yes, our system is developed and hosted on AWS and uses Stripe for secure payments. It also complies with multiple ISO certifications for enhanced security and reliability
Can I cancel at any time?+
Yes, there are no long-term commitments. You can cancel anytime through the system, via the Link Customer Portal, or by contacting our team
Who can I contact for support?+
Netka offers dedicated Thai customer support. Our team is here to provide guidance, resolve issues, and offer close follow-ups throughout your journey.
Phone: +66 2978 6805, +66 2517 4993-4
Email: contact@netkasystem.com
